NOTE: Do NOT manually edit this file. This file is automatically updated when semantic release (release.yml) runs. Manually editing this file can break your releases and break third party tools that use this file.

patches.name: Bypass PairIP license check
patches.description: Disables Google PairIP's license/installer check (com.pairip.licensecheck) so a re-signed build runs on a real device instead of being redirected to the Play Store and killed. No-ops the LicenseContentProvider entry point and LicenseClient.initializeLicenseCheck().

patches.name: Bypass signature verification
patches.description: Disables Simosa's anti-tamper signature check so a re-signed APK launches normally instead of stalling on the splash / "version is not correct" dialog.

patches.name: Remove ads & tracking
patches.description: Removes every ad (AdMob) and every tracker (Firebase Analytics, AppsFlyer, Facebook, TikTok, and the Veridium SDK's own Google Analytics) — event sends, full SDK init (AppsFlyer init, TikTok initializeSdk/startTrack, MobileAds.initialize), and auto-collection. Pushwoosh push is left intact. The app then phones home only to its own Zong API.

patches.name: Remove ads & tracking
patches.description: Removes every ad (interstitial, banner, daily-reward) and every tracker (Mixpanel, Firebase, Facebook, AppsFlyer) — app events, network sends, ad-SDK requests (Google Ads / AppLovin / AnyMind / Prebid), SDK auto-collection, and the ipify IP leak. The app then phones home only to its own Jazz API.

patches.name: Unlock daily reward (skip ad)
patches.description: Claim MyZong's daily reward with no 'watch ad' popup and no ad. Forces the reward-bubble tap to take the app's own direct-claim branch (the same claim call the post-ad path makes), upstream of both the popup and the rewarded ad.

patches.name: Unlock premium (NetMonster)
patches.description: Unlocks NetMonster Premium — forces the premium repo's derived flows so real-time LTE/NR-NSA location calculation is unlocked, ads are removed, and the status shows Active (far-future expiry) without an Adapty subscription.

patches.name: Unlock premium (remove ads)
patches.description: Unlocks Investify premium — forces the backend `no_ads` entitlement getter to report true in both the model and its Realm proxy, so the app treats the account as ad-free without any purchase. Ad SDK loads are gated on this flag app-wide.
